address: Level 9, 153 Walker Street, North Sydney, NSW 2060
services: Commercial solar installation for new constructions
Procurement and logistics for solar projects
usps: Comprehensive end-to-end service including panel layouts, schematic drawings, AC/DC line diagrams, SWMS, project management plans, logistical plans, and operational support
Dedicated internal team of solar and battery engineers overseeing every project from start to finish
Dedicated project manager experienced on construction sites ensuring on-time, on-budget delivery with minimal variations
Exclusive use of hand-selected Tier 1 solar manufacturers, including Sunman's eARC lightweight panel technology, ensuring the highest quality components
ISO 45001:2018 certified for Occupational Health and Safety Management Systems — safety is our top priority
High-quality construction and reliable solar system performance
Proven track record on major projects including the Sydney Art Gallery Extension (300kW system) working alongside Richard Crookes, with 1,800+ pricing quotations completed
ideal_customer: Construction companies, major builders, and property developers requiring solar and battery storage systems installed during the construction phase of new buildings. Also retrofit projects for existing business owners/CFOs, property groups, energy consultants, and large corporates. Key priority: safety compliance, on-time delivery, and budget management.
pricing_structure: Free quotes for solar and battery installations. Competitive pricing with on-time, on-budget delivery. Finance options available. Project values vary by system size and scope.
background: Founded in 2014, Energus is Australia's leading commercial solar and battery solutions provider. Team includes internal solar and energy storage system engineers, dedicated project managers experienced on construction sites, and a procurement manager. Over 80 years of combined industry experience. Deep expertise in technology and module development, system design, and installation. Complies with ISO 45001:2018 and ISO 9001:2016. Uses Tier 1 solar manufacturers. Provides 10-year workmanship warranties on all commercial and industrial solar systems.
why_started: To provide Australia's leading commercial solar and battery solutions. Committed to providing leading-edge technologies while adhering to the strictest installation standards. Empowers customers with complete transparency during all project lifecycle stages.
mission: To provide innovative, high-quality solar and energy storage solutions that meet the diverse needs of commercial, industrial, and utility customers. Committed to delivering cutting-edge technologies and world-class installation practices, ensuring sustainable energy solutions for a cleaner future.
